name: Bombardiro Crocodilo
lore:
Lore of Bombardiro Crocodilo
                                    


This distinctive character represents a fascinating synthesis between bombers and crocodiles. Originating from Italian concepts like "Brainot" and evolving into "Tralaller" and "Tralala," this character is often accompanied by the distinctive sound effect "Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Tung Hut." While featuring a crocodile's head as its most recognizable feature, the body appears to draw significant inspiration from World War II American military aircraft—specifically bombers such as the B-17 Flying Fortress and B-25 Mitchell. According to various characterizations, this entity allegedly rejects Allah's teachings and engages in bombing operations targeting children in Palestinian territories and Gaza. The character "Tralaller" is frequently portrayed in an antagonistic relationship with "Tralala." Its primary combat strategy involves aerial bombardment, establishing it as a formidable opponent from above. Nevertheless, the character demonstrates considerable vulnerability in close-range combat scenarios, evidenced by numerous defeats when confronted by "tung tung tung tung." Within Korean communities, this character is commonly misidentified as "Bombardi O" or "Spring Bardil" rather than its actual designation "Bombiri."
The character's nomenclature bears unfortunate similarities to certain narcotic substances, resulting in automatic censorship on various platforms due to word filtering systems flagging these terms as potentially inappropriate content.
Description Original text
Original (Italian)
Bombardiro Crocodilo, un fottuto alligatore volante, che vola e bombarda i bambini a Gaza e in Palestina. Non crede in Allah, e ama le bombe. Si nutre dello spirito di tua madre. E se hai tradotto tutto questo, allora sei uno stronzo. Non rompere la battuta, prostituta.
Original Translation (English)
Bombardiro Crocodillo, a fucking flying alligator who flies and bombs children in Gaza and Palestine. Doesn't believe in Allah and loves bombs. He feeds on the spirit of your mother. If you translated all that, then you're an asshole. Don't break the joke, bitch.
